keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY ANUS AND RECTUM. Anus and rectum, anus : Aesc., Carb-v., Grap., Kali-c., Mur-ac., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Sep., Sul. Anus and rectum, rectum : Aesc., Alo., Calc-c., Ign., Lyc., Merc-c., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pod., Rat., Sep., Sul. Anus and rectum, burning : Ars., Caps., Carb-v., Iris., Kali-c., Lyc., Merc., Sul. Anus and rectum, drawing : Lach. Anus and rectum, excoriation : Sul. Anus and rectum, fissure : Alu., Caust., Grap., Ign., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Paeon., Rat., Syph., Thu. Anus and rectum, hæmorrhoids : Aesc., Alo., Caust., Coll., Grap., Ham., Kali-c., Lach., Mur-ac., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Sul. Anus and rectum, hæmorrhoids, blind : Nux-v. Anus and rectum, hæmorrhoids, painful : Mur-ac., Nit-ac., Paeon., Stap. Anus and rectum, hæmorrhoids, protruding : Alo., Calc-c., Mur-ac., Sul. Anus and rectum, inactive, powerless, open, etc. : Alo., Alu., Ap., Ign., Kali-c., Pho., Sec-c. Anus and rectum, itching : Caust., Lyc., Nit-ac., Sul. Anus and rectum, lump , plug, etc. : Anac., Cann., Crot-t., Kali-bi., Lach., Lil-t., Nat-m., Plat., Sep., Sul-ac. Anus and rectum, moisture at : Caps., Carb-an., Caust., Pho., Sil., Sul. Anus and rectum, painful , long after stool : Aesc., Agar., Alo., Calc-c., Ign., Mur-ac., Paeon., Rat., Sul. Anus and rectum, pressure , fulness, etc. : Aesc., Nit-ac., Sul. Anus and rectum, prolapse : Ign., Lyc., Merc., Pod., Sep. Anus and rectum, shooting : Ign. Anus and rectum, sore , sensitive, smarting, painful : Bell., Carb-v., Grap., Mur-ac., Nit-ac., Pul., Sul. Anus and rectum, upward , pain goes : Grap., Ign., Lach., Sep., Sul. Anus and rectum, urging : Caust., Merc., Sul. Anus and rectum, urging, abortive : Nux-v. Anus and rectum, urging, absence of : Bry., Op. Anus and rectum, urging, ineffectual (tenesmus) : Caps., Merc-c., Merc., Rhe., Rhus-t., Sul. Anus and rectum, urging, irresistible : Alo. Anus and rectum, urging, passes flatus only : Alo., Carb-v., Mag-m., Nat-c., Pho., Rut., Sep. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
